feed.title: SAP Community - Artificial Intelligence
feed.subtitle: Artificial Intelligence Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to make connection between SAP HANA , SAP AI Core using Cloud Connector?
entry.content:
Hi ,

I have a requirement where my tabular data is in sap hana and i want to load it from there and utilize for an AI Scenario in SAP AI Core using Cloud Connector as mediator between them. Kindly share the suggestion along with a detailed example . Thanks

entry.title: Getting requirements to build wheel did not run successfully for sap aicore
entry.content:
Hi all , I am following a blog to build meter reading model through sap ai core , while installing sap ai core sdk content package it is showing error , please help how to resolve

Blog : https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cv-package-aicore-setup.html#3ff505bb-3988-4607-8b39-6bbfb9bd175f

entry.title: Platform updates to SF AI features needed
entry.content: As a long-time administrator of the SF system I feel that the biggest bang for your time is to update the core features of SF with your AI functionality to not only sell your product, but enhance your current users' experience. Simple updates like better search prediction, name prediction, predictive text in ALL picklist fields are ways to really get this product to step up to where its competitors are and help us users feel that the AI features are useful all around not just selectively placed.

entry.title: Queries on SAP LLM and Joule?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are looking to enable Joule. However before doing so, we want to understand more about following question. Please share your thoughts on these questions.

1. Which LLM model is SAP using? Is it homegrown or Other models like GPT, BERT or LLAMA?

2. How is SAP addressing the hallucination issues?

3. Any other terms and condition that SAP want Client to accept in order to use Gen AI/Joule?
4. Is same LLM used in various modules or different LLM used ? For example for Job description one LLM, For SF chatboat another LLM model?
5. What are the update cadence for the SAP LLM Product like schedule release or Adhoc release?

6 .Where does this LLM resides and size of custom SAP LLM?

7. Once Joule is enabled, can we turn On/Off depending on modules?

entry.title: Training the SAP AI Model with SAP Help Documents
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a requirement for building a chatbot that is trained with SAP Internal Help document.

I have a parent link and in turn the parent link navigates to various sub links.

We want our AI model to be trained with all the data available from the parent link and the sub links.

How can we achieve this ? is there an out of the box integration techniques available for this purpose ?

Thanks,

Santhosini

entry.title: SAP S4 HANA - AI features for Category Management
entry.content:
What AI features can be used to help in category management in SAP S4 HANA MM? Can it be integrated to a assistant which can search market insights for the category?

Can it give insights?

Can it perform some analysis like SWOT analysis to help derive a strategy?

Which version on SAP S4 HANA can do? Can it be done on On prem?

Thanks,

Mrunal

entry.title: Unavailability of AI Core and AI Launchpad in discovery center
entry.content:
Is there a reason that the SAP AI Core and SAP AI launchpad are not showing up in the discovery center?

These services show up as free tier in the SAP Discovery Center. But when I try to add this service in my sub account, it does not show up as a service plan for my account.

Can anyone help me with this? I am facing this error while trying to follow the following tutorial. Also another tutorial.
Thanks!

entry.title: Do you feel the pressure to innovate and adopt cutting-edge technologies like GenAI?
entry.content:
Do you feel the pressure to innovate and adopt cutting-edge technologies like GenAI, but unsure where to begin?

Navigating the complex landscape of innovation can be daunting. It's not just about embracing the latest trends; it's about ensuring that innovation aligns with the needs of your people, is economically viable, and technically feasible. Adding AI into the mix further complicates the equation, as the possibilities it offers are both vast and sometimes overwhelming.

You might find yourself asking, "How can I find the right balance between these factors, including the integration of AI, to create tangible value?"

While there are numerous approaches to this question, our stand-out solution is:

SAP AppHaus’ Human-Centred Approach to Innovation, coupled with its Generative AI Explore Workshop.

Why focus on human-centred design? Often, the most effective way to improve processes is to start by understanding the needs and pain points of the people who actually perform the work. While it may seem intuitive to prioritize certain aspects of innovation, it's only through engaging with end-users that you can truly identify where innovation is most needed.

But where to begin? How do other people and organizations tackle this innovation pressure? This is where thought leaders come into play—individuals who possess the expertise, insights, and innovative ideas to guide you in the right direction.

On March 13, 2024, you’ll have the opportunity to hear from Andreas Hauser, Senior Vice President and Head of the SAP AppHaus Network. With a wealth of experience in orchestrating innovation projects worldwide run by the global SAP AppHaus Network teams, Andreas collaborates closely with experts across diverse fields, gaining insights which he uses to enrich projects with customers.

Join and listen to Andreas share his invaluable insights, and actively engage in dialogue. Post your questions, share your perspectives, and glean insights from a diverse community of innovators.

By the end of the session, you'll emerge with a deeper understanding of today's opportunities, armed with strategies for leveraging SAP's Business AI with SAP Business Technology Platform, in conjunction with the SAP AppHaus Network to propel your innovation journey forward. You will get actionable insights, practical tips, and exclusive access to valuable resources that will empower you to navigate the ever-evolving landscape of innovation with confidence.

Join us here: https://www.youtube.com/live/D_QVQviszaM?si=R0un6RZCOWI-3R5M

Add to calendar: https://url.sap/uxogi7 

We look forward to seeing you!!

entry.title: Re: Using PAL Procedures embeded in SQL Script (anonymous...
entry.content:
Hi Dirk,

based on your PAL procedure example, here is a simple example using anonymous blocks, you don't have to declare the structure of the PAL procedure output:

 

 

do
begin
tv_data = SELECT * FROM PAL_MULTIVARSTAT_DATA_TBL;
tv_parms = SELECT * FROM #PAL_PARAMETER_TBL;
CALL "_SYS_AFL"."PAL_MULTIVARIATE_ANALYSIS"(:tv_data, :tv_parms, tv_out);
SELECT * FROM :tv_out;
END;

 

 

The constraint if structures require to be declared or not comes from SQL Script.

Please note, usage of the Python Machine Learning client might be helpful, as you can script in Python and capture the ad-hoc generated SQL for the PAL procedure or even utilize methods to generate procedure code / even design-time artifacts. Just as another helping note.

I hope this is helpful, otherwise please share more details.

Best regards,

Christoph

entry.title: What is generative AI? How is it useful in SAP? What are its application with respect to SAP PM?
entry.content:
What is generative AI? How is it useful in SAP? What are its application with respect to SAP PM?

 

Can someone elaborate it's uses?

entry.title: AI chatbot
entry.content:
Hi,

we have a large amount of content describing many different processes. this is in ppt, pdf, word, webpage etc. format. I would like to find a solution like chatbot for the team where they can quickly find an answer they are looking for, if you know is any internal solution or anyone that can help, please let me know.

Thanks.

entry.title: LLM, RAG and Cloud Foundry: No space left on device
entry.content:
Hi,

 

we were following a set of blogs and tutorials like:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/enhancing-s-4hana-with-sap-hana-cloud-vector-store-and-genai/ba-p/13655191

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/ai-core-genai-hana-vector.html

 

We need to use the features in a cloud foundry python app. Unfortunately the installation of

package 

sentence-transformers (as part of the requirements.txt file) always leads to a "no space left on device" error during build.
The memory limit is set to 8G, the disk space to 10G in the manifest.yml.
 
How can we solve this issue in the SAP BTP cloud foundry environment ?
 
Any help is highly appreciated.
 
Regards
Marcus

entry.title: Need more information on setting up communication intelligence
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I am looking for documentations on setting up communication intelligence, which was highlighted in below article-

Reference article from SAP – https://news.sap.com/2023/10/decoding-business-correspondence-ai-communication-intelligence/?source=social-Global-TWITTER-BTP-spr-11536664863-account_name&campaigncode=CRM-YA23-SMS-1941768&sprinklrid=11536664863

I have also tried reaching out to the email id mentioned in this article but no response.

Can you please advise.

 

Regards,

Saritha

entry.title: AI/ML Functionality in SAP IBP Inventory Optimization
entry.content:
Hi All,

Would like to gain an insight on the AI/ML functionality in the Inventory Optimization module of SAP IBP if there are any. Any leads or any Help portal links would help. If any functionality exists will be trying to check the changes in the outputs when using AI for the Inventory Optimization run.

Thanks in Advance

Purrab

SAP Integrated Business Planning for inventory Artificial Intelligence Machine Learning

entry.title: Seeking Advice on AI and Communication-Related Topics for Master’s Thesis
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m currently pursuing a Master’s in Media and Communication and working as a student at SAP. I’m planning to focus my thesis on the intersection of AI and communication, particularly within the SAP ecosystem.

I’m looking for suggestions on relevant and impactful thesis topics in this area. If anyone has ideas or knows of any SAP teams working on AI-driven communication strategies, I’d appreciate your guidance or connection.

Thanks in advance for your help!

Best,

Yasaman Jalaei

entry.title: Send Image from SAP Build apps to SAP DoX service via SAP BTP Destination
entry.content:
Hello experts,
my use case is I'm using Take Picture action in Build apps to take a Photo of Invoice and i want to Send the Photo to SAP DOX service via SAP BTP Destination as i'm  getting CORS issue with Normal REST APIs. 
My doubt is How to include the image as a Form-data in the post request??? 
or is there any better way to do This use case Please suggest i'm open for anything!!!

@AnuradhaDhingan 
@aman175105  @Chaitanya_Priya

entry.title: Database explorer, failed generating SQL based on prompt
entry.content:
Hello,
I'm trying to use the new genAI feature in SAP Build Code Database Explorer to generate SQL based on prompt.

What ever the prompt, I'm always getting the following error: "Unable to generate the SQL statement. Error from LLM: Failed to get embeddings. Try rephrasing the prompt."

entry.title: Connect an AWS bucket with SAP AI Launchpad
entry.content: How can I connect my AWS bucket with SAP AI Launchpad and GitHub, in the Object Store Secret part?

entry.title: Predictive ai with sap ai core
entry.content: Has anyone done the learning predictive ai with sap ai core tutorial on ingesting live data into your house price predictor with sap ai core, someone can help me because I'm stuck at step 15?

entry.title: Introducing Joule: SAP’s AI Copilot for Seamless Business Interactions
entry.content:
Introducing Joule: SAP’s AI Copilot for Seamless Business Interactions

 

SAP is transforming the way businesses interact with their systems with Joule, its AI-powered copilot designed to enhance productivity and simplify tasks. Joule serves as a centralized AI assistant across the SAP ecosystem, providing a seamless and context-aware user experience. 

What Makes Joule Unique?

One AI Copilot for SAP: Joule integrates across SAP cloud solutions like SAP SuccessFactors and SAP S/4HANA Cloud, allowing users to interact naturally through language.

Out-of-the-Box & Native Integration: With pre-configured content, Joule is ready to use with minimal setup, making it instantly valuable.

Consistent User Experience: Whether accessed via SAP Start, mobile, or application UIs, Joule ensures a smooth and familiar interaction.

Reliable & Context-Aware: Joule understands user roles, permissions, and the SAP products they use, ensuring relevant responses. 

Responsible & Secure: With strict data protection policies, Joule does not use customer data for AI training or third-party purposes.

 

How Does Joule Help?

  • Provides context-aware responses based on business transactions and data.
  • Maintains cross-application reasoning for efficient navigation across SAP solutions.
  • Leverages Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for document-grounded responses.
  • Ensures data security & compliance by inheriting user authentication rights.
  • Includes ethical AI guardrails to prevent bias, hate speech, and misuse.

By integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) with SAP’s rich business context, Joule enables employees to work 80% more efficiently. It empowers businesses with faster decision-making, streamlined workflows, and enhanced user interactions—truly revolutionizing the SAP experience.

Joule Interaction Patterns is the main starting point.

It branches into four types of interactions:

  • Transactional: Supports CRUD (Create, Read, Update, Delete) operations.
  • Navigational: Helps users find relevant SAP screens.
  • Informational: Provides knowledge-based answers using SAP Help and Customer Content (Document Grounding).
  • Analytical: Enables data insights through SAP Analytics Cloud and JustAsk.

This flowchart visually simplifies the interaction patterns of Joule. 

Unlocking Business Knowledge with Joule’s Document Grounding

In today’s workplace, quick access to accurate information is crucial. Joule’s Document Grounding feature ensures employees get the right answers based on company-specific documents—without the need for complex AI training or manual searching.

  • What is Document Grounding?

Document Grounding allows businesses to upload important documents—like HR policies, travel guidelines, and FAQs—into Joule. When employees ask a question, Joule retrieves the most relevant information from these documents and delivers a clear, concise response with source citations.

 

  • Why Does This Matter?

Traditional AI models rely on general knowledge, which may not always reflect company-specific policies. Grounding enhances AI by:

✔️ Providing business-specific answers based on internal documentation.

✔️ Citing sources, increasing transparency and trust.

✔️ Reducing misinformation by pulling directly from company-approved materials.

✔️ Eliminating costly AI retraining, as Joule dynamically retrieves the latest content.

 

  • How It Transforms the Employee Experience?

For instance, in SAP SuccessFactors, employees can ask Joule questions about HR policies and receive instant, reliable answers. This saves time, reduces confusion, and enhances productivity—making company knowledge more accessible to everyone.
